series_metadata.series_description: (Central Office Supply Order Form) May encumber funds for purchases from other state agencies that involve procurement of supplies, equimpent, or standard forms.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for one year, transfer to the State Records Center for two years. Destroy pro- vided audited by the Auditor of State and the audit report is re- leased., Paper: Wastepaper
